noveltyJustification: Prior finding 004 was confirmed, with new/clarified surfaces for stale memory-index cleanup, manual unlink, actual memory-crud-delete filename, and CLI bulk-delete.
findingsSummary: Core causal-edge delete primitives still hard-delete without tombstones.
memory_delete, memory_bulk_delete, manual unlink, health auto-repair, stale cleanup, and CLI bulk-delete are the must-cover surfaces.
Stale cleanup deletes memory_index rows without direct causal edge cleanup, creating a delayed orphan-edge cleanup problem.
